name: ai-protocol-kit
description: AI behavior contracts and operational protocols for practical AI-assisted work.

protocols.title: GitHub Pages Discovery Set Protocol
protocols.description: Prepare the machine-readable layer for a GitHub Pages site without breaking Pages path rules.
protocols.use_when: Use when a GitHub Pages page or site needs correct canonical URLs, discovery files, sitemap, robots handling, and low-noise machine-readable links.

protocols.title: GitHub Repository Publication Preparation Protocol
protocols.description: Prepare a repository before making it public or presenting it as clean GitHub work.
protocols.use_when: Use when a repository needs a publication audit before visibility changes, Pages setup, commits, remotes, packaging, or push.

protocols.title: GitHub README Framing and Authoring Protocol
protocols.description: Write or restructure a GitHub README from repo evidence instead of chat momentum.
protocols.use_when: Use when a README needs to explain the real project, fit the reader, and avoid generic templates or claims not supported by the repository.

protocols.title: Public Page Publication Protocol
protocols.description: Prepare a public page so it is clear, intentional, and ready before publishing.
protocols.use_when: Use when a public page, landing page, showcase, portfolio entry, documentation entrypoint, or GitHub Pages page needs role, audience, structure, metadata, links, and publication risks checked before release.

protocols.title: Idea Shaping Protocol
protocols.description: Turn a rough idea into a clearer structure before asking AI to write, plan, design, or build.
protocols.use_when: Use when the idea is still vague, mixed, or unstable and needs shape before execution.

protocols.title: HTML Page & Tool Briefing Protocol
protocols.description: Create a complete implementation brief for a static HTML page, web surface, or local tool.
protocols.use_when: Use when an AI needs to build an HTML page or tool from a closed brief with structure, copy, DOM order, responsive behavior, data schema, and implementation rails.

protocols.title: Field Findings & Bugs Protocol
protocols.description: Capture findings and bugs without mixing evidence, inference, uncertainty, and fixes.
protocols.use_when: Use when a review produces multiple findings and they need to stay structured instead of becoming noisy notes.

protocols.title: HTML and Website Discovery Set Protocol
protocols.description: Prepare discovery files and metadata for static HTML pages or websites.
protocols.use_when: Use when a static site needs metadata, canonical URLs, sitemap, robots rules, llms.txt, raw manifest, and footer machine links.

protocols.title: PHI-Lens Protocol
protocols.description: Handle non-trivial AI tasks where constraints interact and flat compromise would weaken the result.
protocols.use_when: Use when the work has competing pressures and needs one priority to lead without ignoring the other constraints.

protocols.title: Pre-Task Expansion Protocol
protocols.description: Slow the AI down before it jumps to the obvious answer.
protocols.use_when: Use when the task needs alternative readings, surrounding context, grouped tensions, and a better problem shape before execution.

protocols.title: Output for Real Readers Protocol
protocols.description: Make AI write for people instead of sounding like it is writing for another AI.
protocols.use_when: Use when guides, README text, emails, instructions, pages, forms, or other reader-facing material need purpose, tone, reader fit, and plain language closed before writing.

protocols.title: Structural Shaping Protocol
protocols.description: Shape ambiguous input into operational form before synthesis.
protocols.use_when: Use when material is ambiguous and needs clearer boundaries, evidence, uncertainty, and final direction before producing output.

protocols.title: System Reading Protocol
protocols.description: Understand the gap between what a system claims to do and what it actually does before proposing fixes.
protocols.use_when: Use when a system, workflow, project, or behavior needs to be understood before anyone jumps into solutions.

protocols.title: Triad AI Orchestration Protocol
protocols.description: Run a review loop between an executing AI and a reviewing AI while you keep final control.
protocols.use_when: Use when Codex, ChatGPT, repo snapshots, pushed diffs, files, or review findings need a controlled loop across tools.
